# CustomReportResponse

**Object**

A container for Impression Share report metrics.

## Declaration

```swift
object CustomReportResponse
```

## Discussion

See also [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Impression-Share-Report],  [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-a-Single-Impression-Share-Report], [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Get-All-Impression-Share-Reports], and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/CustomReportRequest].

## Objects

- **CustomReportResponse.Selector**: A list of condition objects.

## Impression Share Report Request and Response Objects

- **CustomReportRequest**: The Impression Share report request body.
- **CustomReportResponseBody**: A container for the Impression Share report response body.
- **SovCondition**: The list of condition objects that allow users to filter a list of records.
